# Support

## Documentation
Start with our [docs/](../docs/) directory for guides, API references, and concepts.

## Community
- **GitHub Discussions:** General questions and feature ideas
- **GitHub Issues:** Bug reports and feature requests (use templates)

## Direct Support
- **Email:** support@baseusdp.com (48-hour response time)

## Security Issues
Do NOT open public issues for security vulnerabilities. Email security@baseusdp.com instead and allow 90 days for resolution before public disclosure.

## What to Include
- Browser and wallet versions
- Transaction hash if applicable
- Steps to reproduce
- Screenshots or console errors
- Network (mainnet or testnet)
